scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.check:publint: publint packages/design-system-assets && publint packages/design-system-stickers && publint packages/design-system-css && publint packages/design-system-react && publint packages/design-system-svelte
scripts.check:exports: attw --pack packages/design-system-assets --profile esm-only --entrypoints . && attw --pack packages/design-system-stickers --profile esm-only --entrypoints . ./react && attw --pack packages/design-system-css --profile esm-only --entrypoints . ./types && attw --pack packages/design-system-react --profile esm-only --entrypoints . ./static ./client ./types && attw --pack packages/design-system-svelte --profile esm-only --ignore-rules internal-resolution-error
scripts.check:packages: npm run pack:check && npm run check:publint && npm run check:exports
scripts.check: npm run check:styles && npm run check:manifest && npm run check:docs && npm run check:public-api && npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run check:packages
scripts.deploy:showroom: npm run build --workspace @cofob/design-system-css && npm run build --workspace @cofob/design-system-react && npm run build --workspace @cofob/design-system-svelte && npm run build --workspace @cofob/design-system-assets && npm run build --workspace @cofob/design-system-stickers && npm run build --workspace @cofob/design-system-showroom && wrangler pages deploy apps/showroom/dist --project-name cofob-design-system --branch main
